title: Get started
subtitle: A few quick steps to secure your vault. You can come back to these any time.

recovery.title: Save your recovery kit
recovery.description: Your recovery key is the only way back into your vault if you forget your master password. Download and store it somewhere safe.

twofa.title: Enable two-factor authentication
twofa.description: Add a second factor so a stolen password alone can't unlock your account.

extension.title: Install the browser extension
extension.description: Autofill and capture logins right where you browse.

firstItem.title: Add your first item
firstItem.description: Create a login by hand, or import from another password manager.
